title: Section 36
content: Where any Benches are constituted, the 1[Chairman] may, from time to time, by notification, make provisions as to the distribution of the business of the Appellate Tribunal amongst the Benches and also provide for the matters which may be dealt with by each Bench.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 28 of 2016, s. 232, for "Chairperson" (w.e.f. 1-6-2016)
